name: Everland Public Company Limited
summary: Everland Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates a real estate development business in Thailand. It operates in two segments, Property Development, and Hospital and Dental Clinic. The company develops land for various residential properties, such as townhouses, single-detached houses, and condominiums. It is also involved in the operation and investment in private hospitals and dental clinics; and provision of land and hospital buildings for rent. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
